headline: Market expert sees opportunity in Toast, GE Aerospace
summary: STORY: "I think that there's a lot of opportunities out there for stocks that have long-term, compelling stories but are really getting beaten up or ignored in this market," she said. Miller points to Toast, which provides point-of-sale software that helps restaurants process orders and payments, saying growing adoption of the technology could support the stock long term. She also likes GE Aerospace, citing its exposure to "airlines, transport and engines" as a driver of future growth.
